steps.speaker: Dimoni
steps.text: You two again?! I told you to never bother me or my vassals.

steps.speaker: Dimoni
steps.text: Look at what you did to my bou! It took me years to create him.

steps.speaker: Dimoni
steps.text: I had to kidnap a whole family of margers to put it together. The whole three generations!

steps.speaker: Balchar
steps.text: Your bou attacked us! What were you expecting us to do!

steps.speaker: Dimoni
steps.text: YOU BROKE INTO HIS HOME! What were YOU expecting HIM to do!

steps.speaker: Balchar
steps.text: Well I guess you have a point there... Sorry for killing your stone beast

steps.speaker: Balchar
steps.text: Please would you accept my beast as a compensation gift?

steps.speaker: Bep
steps.text: What the fuck man?!

steps.speaker: Dimoni
steps.text: HA HA HA. Well you have a sense of humor I have to admit

steps.speaker: Bep
steps.text: Dimoni banyut...

steps.speaker: Dimoni
steps.text: SILENCE! You defeated my guardian afterall. Perhaps you are not entirely useless, foner.

steps.speaker: Dimoni
steps.text: You know what, take this. The Talayotic mask shall bend stone to your will. You have earned it.

steps.speaker: Balchar
steps.text: A mask. Fine.

steps.speaker: Bep
steps.text: Balchar... I feel strange... something is happening!

steps.speaker: Balchar
steps.text: Bep, what are you--

steps.speaker: Bep
steps.text: *Farts*

steps.speaker: Bep
steps.text: AAAH! the world RIPPED OPEN! What is happening to me?!

steps.speaker: Dimoni
steps.text: Ha! You thought we were done? That sheep ate my herbs. Every dimoni on this island wants a piece of him now.

steps.speaker: Dimoni
steps.text: My fire burns inside him. Wherever he goes, portals will tear open. Good luck, foner.

steps.speaker: Bep
steps.text: Balchar! I can feel the portal pulling us!

steps.speaker: Balchar
steps.text: This is your fault, Bep. I just wanted a nap...
